case_title: BARRON, JOSEPH et al VS PENG, KWEK CHOY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-29-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 11/28/06 AT 10:00 A.M. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT PENDING.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-27-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 2/27/07 10:00 A.M. SETTLEMENT PENDING IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-27-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-10-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 4/10/07 10:00 A.M. PARTIES SHALL APPEAR FOR TRIAL.
CORRESPONDENCE TO JOSEPH BARRON RETURNED. JOSEPH BARRON IS DECEASED.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO JOSEPH BARRON RETURNED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE COURT TO JOSEPH BARRON RETURNED. ADDRESSEE IS DECEASED.
PER ORDER OF COMM SLAVIT, CASE REMAINS FOR 4/12/07 @ 10AM. IF CASE SETTLED, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR. AND NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL DISMISS W/ PREJUDIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRON, JOSEPH BALBON, BRIAN W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENG, KWEK CHOY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR PAYMENT OF $3,000 PREVIOUSLY TENDERED TO PLAINTIFF. UPON SATISFACTION OF THE REMAINDER OF THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST THAT JUDGMENT BE VACATED, AND THAT THIS ACTION BE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BARRON, JOSEPH BALBON, BRIAN W. AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, KWEK CHOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-29-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-18-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO JOSEPH BARRON. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, KWEK CHOY
